hook: There are more trees on Earth than stars in our galaxy.
core_fact: Earth has an estimated ~3 trillion trees; the Milky Way holds an estimated 100-400 billion stars.
status_column: Idea Pool - Batch2 screened; hold for MG-lane test
visual: Forest beat to galaxy beat, scale comparison. Pure MG/scale storytelling.
risk: Medium-high. Hardest to make not feel like a slideshow; explicit MG-lane stress test, not safe-queue filler.
source_policy: Use Higgsfield free/Ultra models for source frames; generate multiple candidates; no metered paid video without explicit approval.

must: no internal-anatomy/process beat as core visual
